title: UKSSSC Livestock Extension Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 120 Posts
post_name: Pashudhan Prasar Adhikari (Livestock Extension Officer), Group-C
short_info: The Uttarakhand Subordinate Services Selection Commission (UKSSSC) has published the Pashudhan Prasar Adhikari (Livestock Extension Officer) Notification 2026 on 08 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 120 Livestock Extension Officer positions. Candidates within the age range of 21–42 years (with relaxations for SC/ST/OBC, Divyang, Ex-Servicemen, and other reserved categories) and holding a Bachelor’s Degree in Biology, Agriculture, or Animal Husbandry are eligible to apply online at www.sssc.uk.gov.in. The application process will be active from 13 May 2026 to 02 June 2026, and candid

application_fee.details: Payment mode: Credit Card / Debit Card / Net Banking / UPI only. Bank drafts and cheques are not accepted. Fee once paid is non-refundable. Application is considered complete only when fee reaches the Commission's account within the deadline.

age_limit.details: The decisive date (cut-off) for age calculation is 01 July 2026. Candidates must be minimum 21 years and not more than 42 years as on this date — i.e., born not after 01 July 2005 and not before 02 July 1984.

qualification.domicile: Permanent/Original Resident Certificate of Uttarakhand; AND Employment Office registration in Uttarakhand (mandatory for all candidates applying under Group-C direct recruitment outside UKPSC purview)
qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the closing date of online application (02-06-2026). The application is open to candidates outside the Uttarakhand Public Service Commission's purview. Candidates must be registered at an Employment Office in Uttarakhand or hold a valid Permanent/Original Resident Certificate of Uttarakhand. | Educational Qualification | Pre-Appointment Training Note: Selected candidates for Livestock Extension Officer will undergo 06 months training at the Departmental Training Centre and 06 months training at Departmental Veterinary Hospitals under the supervision of Veterinary Officers before being appointed to vacancies. During training, no salary, honorarium or allowances are payable. | Desirable / Additional Qualifications (Bonus Marks)

vacancy_details.Post / Department: Livestock Extension Officer (Animal Husbandry Dept.) – Direct Recruitment
Livestock Extension Officer (Animal Husbandry Dept.) – For Departmental Employees only

selection_process: Subject Type Total Questions Maximum Marks Duration
Biology, Agriculture and Animal Husbandry (जीव विज्ञान, कृषि एवं पशुपालन) Objective MCQ (OMR/CBT) 100 100 2 Hours

syllabus.details: Written Examination – One Paper: Biology, Agriculture and Animal Husbandry (100 Marks, 100 Questions, 2 Hours) | Note: Part A is compulsory for all candidates. Part B (Biology – Botany and Zoology) and Part C (Agriculture and Animal Husbandry) are optional; candidates must choose any one of Part B or C. | Part A – Compulsory for All (30 Marks) | Part B – Biology (Botany and Zoology) – 70 Marks [OPTIONAL – any one of B or C] | Part C – Agriculture and Animal Husbandry – 70 Marks [OPTIONAL – any one of B or C] | NOTE: Current General Knowledge and scientific advancement related to the above units are also deemed to be included in the syllabus.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the UKSSSC portal www.sssc.uk.gov.in. No manual or postal applications will be accepted. The online portal will be active from 13 May 2026 to 02 June 2026. A correction window will be available from 05 June 2026 to 07 June 2026.
Online Application Process – Step by Step:
At time of uploading the online application, the following must be uploaded along with:
High School (10th) certificate — for name, father's name and date of birth proof (only HS marksheet accepted for DOB; no other document valid)
important_instructions: Online applications only — no manual or postal applications will be accepted. Candidates must ensure they fulfill all eligibility conditions (educational qualification, age, domicile, employment registration) before applying. Admission at all stages is provisional and candidature can be cancelled even after final selection if found ineligible. Candidates must not fill more than one online application form for the same post. If multiple applications are submitted, all will be cancelled. Candidates can cancel and re-apply before the deadline, but fee paid for a cancelled application will not be refunded or adjusted. All information filled in the online application is treated as final and confirmed. Incorrect or false information / fake certificates will result in debarment from all UKSSSC examinations and FIR under applicable laws. Signatures on the application, attendance sheet, document verification, and other correspondence must be identical at all places — any discrepancy may result in cancellation of candidature. Each candidate must provide their own separate mobile number and email ID — not shared with other family members. Admit cards will not be sent by post — they must be downloaded from the UKSSSC website. Candidates must regularly check the website throughout the recruitment process. Mobile phones, calculators, pagers, scanners, or any electronic communication devices are strictly prohibited inside the examination hall. Violation will attract debarment from future UKSSSC exams and further action. Examination centre preferences are taken into account, but the Commission's decision on exam centre allotment is final and binding. Candidates absent during document verification will have their candidature cancelled without any notice. All Uttarakhand State Agitation Activist / dependant certificates must be claimed in the online application form to avail reservation; no benefit is available if not claimed at application stage. No TA/DA is payable to any candidate for attending written examination or document verification. Any person with more than one living spouse, or a woman who has married a person with a living spouse, is not eligible for appointment. All decisions of the Commission regarding eligibility, selection, and other matters are final and binding. The Commission does not provide individual counselling on eligibility.
